ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>Balanced response, maintains persona and context relevance while offering a discount in line with the character's profit-seeking nature.
baseline_no_context<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>Fair trade emphasized, but lacks directness and contextual relevance to urgency; persona consistent with a merchant's concern for integrity.
